case_title: OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY KNOWN AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL) VS. MARIA CONCEPCION RIVERA DESALES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY KNOWN AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL)
ORDER DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
